docs.title: Marsisus' site
docs.text: Welcome to my site, I will post here all the documentations, files, attachments... i make and post on github.

docs.title: 📖 About
docs.text: I am a french student focused on programming and creating little programs, I created this site in order to put my creations in, and to explain what I do. Moreover, I will write here all the documentations for the programs I create.
